title: Agility, Boston Dynamics Join ASTM Panel on Real Humanoid ROI
excerpt: Industry leaders tackle deployment reality vs hype at March standards panel

title: Agility and Boston Dynamics Push ASTM to Set Humanoid Safety Standards
excerpt: Agility Robotics and Boston Dynamics have joined an ASTM International technical committee to develop the first formal safety standards for humanoid robots in commercial environments — a move that could shape the entire industry's regulatory trajectory.

title: AMC Robotics Partners Hive GPU Cloud for Security Bot AI
excerpt: AMC Robotics leverages Hive's sustainable GPU infrastructure to accelerate AI training for quadruped security applications

title: Apptronik Raises $520M Extension for Apollo Humanoid Production
excerpt: Austin-based Apptronik extends Series A to $935M total, marking largest humanoid robotics round as company scales Apollo production

title: Bipedal Robot Achieves Dynamic Fall Recovery Breakthrough
excerpt: New bipedal robot demonstrates unprecedented dynamic fall recovery capabilities in latest research breakthrough

title: BMW Deploys First Humanoid Robot at Leipzig Plant
excerpt: BMW becomes first major automaker to deploy humanoid robots in production, marking industrial automation milestone

title: Boston Dynamics CEO Robert Playter Steps Down After 30 Years
excerpt: Playter's departure marks end of era for robotics pioneer after leading commercialization push

title: Figure AI CEO Details Robot Strategy in Bloomberg Interview
excerpt: Brett Adcock outlines Figure's path to commercializing humanoid robots for industrial applications

title: Figure AI CEO Dodges Police Robot Sales Question
excerpt: Brett Adcock sidesteps Marc Benioff's direct question about selling humanoid robots to law enforcement agencies

title: Figure AI's 0.3% Hire Rate Signals Intense Talent War
excerpt: Figure AI's CEO reveals 170,000 job applications yielded fewer than 500 hires, highlighting humanoid robotics talent scarcity

title: Galbot Raises RMB 2.5B in Alibaba-Led Round, Eyes Logistics Deployment
excerpt: Galbot has closed one of China's largest humanoid funding rounds — RMB 2.5 billion (~$345M) — with Alibaba and Meituan co-leading, targeting deployment across China's vast e-commerce fulfillment infrastructure.

title: Honor Unveils Humanoid Robot Concept at MWC 2026, Targets Smart Home
excerpt: Smartphone maker Honor used MWC Barcelona 2026 to unveil a humanoid robot concept designed for smart home integration, becoming the latest consumer electronics company to enter the humanoid space.

title: Rivian CEO RJ Scaringe Quietly Backs New Humanoid Startup Mind Robotics
excerpt: Rivian CEO RJ Scaringe has made a personal seed investment in Mind Robotics, a stealth humanoid startup founded by former Tesla and Boston Dynamics engineers, according to sources familiar with the deal.

title: Neura Robotics Raises €1B Led by Tether in Massive Round
excerpt: German cognitive robotics startup secures massive €1B round from crypto giant Tether, signaling institutional crypto capital entering humanoids

title: OSU's Hurst Co-Founded $2.5B Humanoid Robot Company
excerpt: OSU professor Jonathan Hurst co-founded Agility Robotics, now valued at $2.5 billion

title: Phantom MK1: The First Combat-Ready Humanoid Robot Enters Field Trials
excerpt: The Phantom MK1, a bipedal combat humanoid developed for military applications, has entered field trials — marking the first documented deployment of a humanoid robot in a military operational environment.

title: Qualcomm IQ10 Powers Neura Robotics' Next-Gen Humanoids
excerpt: Qualcomm's IQ10 chip will power Neura Robotics' next humanoid platform, marking chipmaker's serious robotics push

title: Qualcomm IQ10 Powers Neura's Next-Gen Humanoids
excerpt: Qualcomm's new IQ10 processors will power Neura Robotics' next generation of humanoid robots

title: Sunday Robotics Hits $1.15B Valuation with Household Humanoid Push
excerpt: Chinese humanoid startup Sunday Robotics has reached unicorn status with a $200M Series B valuing the company at $1.15B, pivoting from industrial to consumer and elderly care markets.

title: Tesla Optimus Walks Times Square in Surprise Public Appearance
excerpt: Tesla staged a surprise public demonstration of Optimus Gen 3 in Times Square on Friday evening, drawing massive crowds and media attention — the first fully autonomous public-space humanoid demo from any major company.

title: Tether Backs Generative Bionics €70M Series A Round
excerpt: Tether joins €70M Series A for Italian humanoid robotics startup Generative Bionics

title: Toyota Deploys 7 Agility Robots in Canadian Auto Plant
excerpt: Toyota becomes first major automaker to deploy humanoid robots in production, signaling automotive industry shift

title: Westwood THEMIS Gen2.5: First Commercial Humanoid for Mobile Manipulation
excerpt: Westwood Robotics unveils THEMIS Gen2.5, claiming world's first commercial full-size humanoid for manipulation on the move

title: Xiaomi Runs Factory Trials for Next-Gen Humanoid, Eyes 2027 Production
excerpt: Xiaomi has begun supervised factory trials of a next-generation humanoid robot at its Beijing smart factory, with sources indicating a target for limited production-line deployment by 2027.
